_doc: A+ Type 1 — Single ASIN. 1 product, 1 listing. Default Plan B (Storyboard Seamless). Verified qua TNTD180326i750 Reward Jar (test v3).

plan_B_storyboard._description: Storyboard seamless narrative — 5 module liền mạch dọc với visual motif thread (token trail, coral lines, rainbow arcs) nối liền mạch. Priority: brand moat qua distinctive style. Bán meaning/identity/memory theo doctrine.
plan_B_storyboard._when_to_use: Default cho mọi single-ASIN. Niche handmade gift, storytelling product (kid gift, keepsake, anniversary).

modules.name: Open Scene
modules.intent: Brand tag + hero promise + thiết lập universe của niche

layout.top_25pct: Decorative illustrated band — rainbow arc, star confetti, category tag (uppercase Baloo in accent color)
layout.middle_50pct: Centered Baloo BOLD 3-line promise headline + italic Calligraphy subhead
layout.bottom_25pct: Warm lifestyle hero — child + product + ambient bokeh. Scale-anchored per R3.

modules.visual_thread_bridge: token dot trail + star confetti flows diagonally top-right → bottom-left, bridges into hero photo

seduction_gate.PAIN: Small wins go unseen in daily parenting
seduction_gate.HOOK: Emotional hero + rainbow decoration + brand tag instant recognition

modules.name: Daily Ritual
modules.intent: Positive 3-second transformation showing how the product works. NO pain/negative imagery.

layout.left_40pct: italic Calligraphy script headline + Calligraphy subhead + Baloo body caption
layout.right_60pct: 3 vertically stacked circular macro moments in soft rounded frames: (1) hand + component, (2) action moment, (3) result + emotion

modules.visual_thread_bridge: token dot trail + star confetti + mini rainbow arcs connect 3 circles, loops to left text

seduction_gate.PAIN: Complex systems don't survive daily routines

modules.name: Handcrafted Proof
modules.intent: Chạm pain 'Amazon full of cheap mass-produced' → proof by tactile craftsmanship detail. KHÔNG duplicate listing 'what's in box'.

layout.top_10pct: Baloo BOLD headline on warm birch/workshop background
layout.middle_80pct: 3 horizontal macro close-ups with thin accent dividers: (1) process shot (laser cutter / hand-work), (2) detail under magnifier, (3) functional detail (magnet / mechanism)
layout.bottom_10pct: Baloo stat bar with 3 trust cues

modules.ref_strategy_note: 1-ref tổng hợp thường tốt hơn 3-refs lệch function. `hero_lifestyle` chứa product + loose components đủ cho 2/3 panel. Panel process (laser cutter) KHÔNG cần product ref.

modules.name: Milestones of Pride
modules.intent: Show identity/memory outcomes — niche-specific milestones. Focus ON MOMENTS not rooms (slot 8 listing đã lo where-to-use).

layout.top_10pct: Baloo BOLD emotional headline — ưu tiên REUSE từ FINAL listing cho brand consistency
layout.middle_80pct: 3 horizontal family vignettes separated by soft ribbon dividers. Jar/product identical silhouette across 3 panels (R2 enforce parallel). Scale R3 per panel.
layout.ribbon_overlays: Calligraphy italic ribbon labels — mỗi milestone specific (e.g. 'First Dry Night', 'Shared Without Asked', 'Homework Done Proud'). Mỗi ribbon appears ONCE ONLY.

modules.visual_thread_bridge: token dot trail weaves between 3 vignettes

modules.name: Gift + Keepsake + CTA
modules.intent: Close theo doctrine: gift + memory + identity. Handmade authenticity + gift-ready packaging + CTA button.

layout.left_55pct: Gift-ready flat lay top-down on warm wood plank — product + gift box + packaging components + loose scattered items + Calligraphy 'A gift today.' overlay
layout.right_45pct: Solid accent color block — Baloo BOLD 'A Keepsake Tomorrow.' + body memory-anchor copy + rounded CTA button in Baloo + 3 trust badges row

modules.visual_thread_bridge: Rainbow arc / motif echoing M1 opening — closes storybook loop

seduction_gate.HOOK: Handmade flat-lay + memory promise + action button

plan_A_modular._description: Backup option. Modular formula (hero → pain/solution → what's-in-box → use-cases → CTA). Verified tracked test nhưng có issues: M2 pain imagery clash brand tone, M3 tends duplicate listing slot 5. Use only nếu niche ưu tiên classic funnel logic.
plan_A_modular._when_to_use: Fallback nếu storyboard không fit niche (e.g. tech-heavy product cần comparison-first).

modules.name: Pain/Solution Split
modules.caveat: Risk brand-tone clash if listing 100% positive
